# Newtons AI - LLM Context & Documentation

## Project Overview
**Name:** Newtons AI
**Description:** A clinical-grade AI platform bridging the gap between medical expertise and artificial intelligence. Founded by Dr. Shiva Kolli (Doctor & Developer), it provides autonomous management systems for hospitals and clinical decision support for individual practitioners.
**URL:** https://dr.newtons.in
**Mission:** "AI won't replace doctors. But doctors who use AI will replace those who don't."
**Status:** HIPAA-ready, PWA-enabled, 4.8/5 rated.

## Core Products

### 1. Clinical Copilot (Doctor's App)
A mobile-first AI assistant for diagnosis, treatment planning, and ICU protocols.
*   **Target:** Individual Doctors, Medical Students, NEET PG Aspirants.
*   **Key Features:**
    *   **OPD Assistant:** Instant history taking, differential diagnosis generation, and symptom summary.
    *   **Rx Planner:** Evidence-based standard treatment protocols, dosage calculations, and drug interaction alerts.
    *   **ICU Support:** Real-time risk prediction and stabilization protocols based on ABG/Vitals.
    *   **Doctor Control:** AI functions as a suggestion engine; final decisions remain with the clinician.
*   **Access:** https://app.newtons.in

### 2. Autonomous HMS (Hospital Management System)
A full-stack web application for clinic and hospital automation.
*   **Target:** Hospitals, Clinics, Nursing Homes.
*   **Key Features:**
    *   **Voice Agent:** Drafts patient history via voice input in local languages.
    *   **Lab Sync (Active Loop):** Auto-pulls reports from analyzers (e.g., CBC), reads data, and auto-updates treatment plans.
    *   **Smart Inventory:** Real-time stock deduction based on prescriptions; refill alerts.
    *   **IPD Management:** Admission to discharge lifecycle, ward tracking, and cumulative billing.
    *   **Finance:** Revenue (Accrual) vs. Cash Flow analysis, Patient Debt tracking.
*   **Access:** https://hms.newtons.in

## Pricing Structure

| Plan | Target Audience | Price (Monthly) | Price (Yearly) | Savings |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Doctor's App** | Individual Practitioners | ₹500 / month | ₹3,000 / year | ~50% |
| **Hospital HMS** | Clinics & Hospitals | ₹990 / month | ₹9,999 / year | ~15% |

*Note: Pricing is transparent with no hidden charges. Free tiers available for trial.*

## Franchise & Hospital Setup ("Digital Hospital")
Newtons AI provides a turnkey solution to set up digital clinics, including software, hardware, and supply chains.

**Infrastructure Estimates (INR):**
*   **Software:** Included (Newtons AI HMS).
*   **Lab Machinery:** Biochemistry Analyser (~₹70k), 3-Part Cell Counter (~₹1.9L), Centrifuge (~₹1.5k).
*   **Medical Devices:** 3-Lead ECG (~₹16k), Medical Supplies Kit (~₹8.2k).
*   **Furniture/Infra:** Patient Beds x4 (~₹48k), Laptops x3 (~₹30k), Power/UPS (~₹29k).
*   **Starter Kits:** Pharmacy Stock (~₹10k), Lab Reagents & Rapid Cards (Malaria, Dengue, HIV, etc.).

## System Usage & Shortcuts
The platform is a Progressive Web App (PWA) supporting offline usage.

**Keyboard Shortcuts:**
*   `Ctrl + K`: Open Command Bar (AI Assistant & Navigation).
*   `Ctrl + P`: Quick Print (Prescriptions/Bills).
*   `Ctrl + S`: Save Record.
*   `Esc`: Close Modals.

**Clinical Workflow:**
1.  **OPD:** Input complaints -> AI suggests questions -> Summary generated -> Doctor confirms Rx.
2.  **HMS Automation:** Patient Voice Input -> Doctor Approval -> Auto-Order Tests -> Lab Analyzer Sync -> Auto-Update Rx -> Auto-Bill.
